## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX feedback with Nate Anderson from Teero, discussing their experience and exploring potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero values GrowthX's full-service approach, seeing significant improvements in content quality and time savings](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Desire for earlier metric management and clearer attribution to demonstrate ROI](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Preference for less frequent but longer strategy sessions, with more flexible ad-hoc communication](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Openness to post-publishing review for most content, with exceptions for sensitive topics](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Topics

### Teero's Growth and Context

  - [Teero grew from 0 to $20-25M run rate in staffing revenue over 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Expanded from one state to multiple, now seeking inbound strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Team grew from 13 to 20 people, still without dedicated marketers](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Evolution

  - [Initially sought tool setup (AeroOps), evolved into full-service content creation](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Content quality improved significantly over 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Review time reduced from 2 hours to 5-20 minutes per batch](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Appreciates efforts to show ROI through HubSpot tracking](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Seeks rough correlation between blog visits and sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Interested in lead magnets for better attribution, especially for dental offices](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Strategy and Communication

  - [Prefers less frequent but longer strategy sessions over weekly check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Values flexibility in communication (e.g., Loom videos, ad-hoc calls)](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Emphasizes importance of accountability on both sides](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Open to post-publishing review for most content](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Requests pre-publishing review for sensitive topics (e.g., hygienist pay)](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Willing to provide recorded feedback to improve content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### GrowthX Platform Preview

  - [Shown early version of GrowthX's integrated content creation system](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Platform includes automated workflows, human review steps, and customizable triggers](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement flagging system for high-risk topics requiring pre-publishing review](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Explore recording Nate's feedback on edits to create better content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Transition to more strategy-focused meetings with flexible communication in between](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Work towards clearer metric management and attribution early in the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Prepare for Nate's eventual access to GrowthX's new content creation platform](https://fathom.video/share/r9aYATgsNkZeN8yvmHTS9cPyKuzzUrpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
